title: thelocactus conothelos subsp. conothelos
intro: Thelocactus conothelos subsp. conothelos is a species of cactus native to Mexico, characterized by its cylindrical stems and white or pale yellow flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelocactus conothelos subsp. conothelos include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Traditional herbal preparations involve infusing the plant in water or alcohol to create teas, tonics, and ointments that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
